content: The mound visit Carter Baumler received from Rangers manager Skip Schumaker on Monday night wasn't to take the rookie right-hander out of his last spring training game, but rather to let him know he made the Opening Day roster.

title: Warriors' Moody stretchered off with knee injury
content: Warriors wing Moses Moody suffered a noncontact left knee injury late in Monday night's OT win in Dallas, exiting the floor on a stretcher.

content: UCLA star Lauren Betts had a career-high 25 points to lead the way in an 87-68 blowout win over Oklahoma State in the second round of the NCAA tournament.

content: The Bucks waived guard Cam Thomas to convert the contract of forward Pete Nance into a standard deal.

content: Austria has been hit by a procession of high-profile paedophilia scandals and victims' groups say there is a deep-seated reluctance to uproot problem.

content: Trump claimed the United States was having "very good" discussions with Tehran, despite Iranian state media denying reports of any negotiations between the two warring nations.

content: While Rekha Gupta slammed the previous government's 'freebie culture', she allocated Rs 260 crore in the Budget for delivering two free LPG cylinders.

title: Mother's Death, 16-Lakh Debt, A Lover: Revelations In UP Astrologer's Suicide
content: Rajveer, the astrologer, used to tell his acquaintances that if his mother died, he would too, the police said.

title: Converted Christians Cannot Claim Scheduled Caste Status: Supreme Court
content: The verdict came in a case involving a man who had converted to Christianity and was working as a pastor, but had filed a complaint under the SC/ST (Prevention of Atrocities) Act alleging assault and caste-based abuse.

title: Parliament Budget Session 2026 LIVE: PM Modi Addresses Rajya Sabha On Middle East Conflict
content: Parliament Budget Session 2026 LIVE Updates: On Monday, PM Modi addressed citizens' concerns with regard to the impact of the US-Israel conflict with Iran and the challenges it has created for India.

title: How Jeffrey Epstein Handled This Billionaire's Dealings With Women
content: Leon Black paid Jeffrey Epstein about $170 million over six years for services he described as financial advice.

title: "Do Something": Pilots Flagged Miscommunications At LaGuardia Before Crash
content: "Please do something," a pilot wrote last summer in one report about the airport to NASA's Aviation Safety Reporting System after a close collision call.

title: IPL: Kal Somani-led consortium buys 100% stake in RR for $1.63 billion
content: US entrepreneur Kal Somani, backed by the Walton and Hamp families, has secured ownership of the Rajasthan Royals franchise for $1.63 billion. This significant acquisition marks a new chapter for the IPL team.

title: 'Universal joke': Rahul Gandhi on PM Modi's foreign policy, says he's 'compromised'
content: Rahul Gandhi has sharply criticized Prime Minister Modi's foreign policy, labeling it a "personal" and "universal joke," and suggesting Modi is "compromised" by US President Trump. Gandhi also voiced concerns over rising LPG and fuel prices, warning of public suffering and questioning the Prime Minister's handling of the situation, contrasting it with the Covid-19 pandemic's tragedies.

title: 'Except West Bengal': SC notes 'hardly any litigation' over SIR in other states
content: The Supreme Court will consider extending the deadline for freezing electoral rolls in West Bengal, acknowledging concerns over procedural irregularities in the state's voter list exercise.

title: Amazon AWS operations disrupted second time this month due to US-Iran war
content: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has confirmed disruptions in its Bahrain cloud infrastructure due to drone activity amid the Middle East conflict. The company is working to restore services and advises customers to migrate to alternate regions. This marks the second impact on AWS facilities in the region, following previous drone strikes in the UAE and Bahrain.

title: How much oil does India have? PM Modi explains nation’s preparedness amid global fuel crisis
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi assured India of sufficient crude oil storage and uninterrupted supply amidst the West Asia war's global fuel crunch. He highlighted the nation's strategic oil reserves and increased refining capacity, while emphasizing India's commitment to peace through dialogue and diplomacy in the region.

title: Stock market today: Nifty50 ends above 22,900; BSE Sensex rises over 1,300 points
content: Stock market today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex rallied in trade on Tuesday on hopes of easing tensions in the Middle East. While Nifty50 went above 23,000, BSE Sensex rose over 1,600 points intraday.

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai's one-line reaction to ChatGPT launch
content: Google CEO Sundar Pichai revealed his "uncomfortably exciting" reaction to ChatGPT's 2022 launch, admitting the speed of AI diffusion surprised even his "AI-first" company. This prompted a 'Code Red' that ultimately led to the development of Gemini 3, now outperforming rivals. Pichai emphasized Google's quiet, full-stack innovation approach, building necessary infrastructure before product release.

title: Massive blow! RCB star ruled out of IPL 2026
content: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru will be without fast bowler Yash Dayal for IPL 2026 due to personal reasons. Director of Cricket Mo Bobat confirmed Dayal remains under contract and will receive continued support from the franchise during this challenging period. Dayal was a key bowler for RCB, contributing significantly to their 2024 playoff run and 2025 title win.

title: Kerala assembly polls: How rich are candidates in God's Own Country?
content: Among ministers contesting the election, there is a sharp contrast. K B Ganesh Kumar from Pathanapuram has declared assets of Rs 6.37 crore, while P Prasad from Cherthala has assets of just Rs 9.49 lakh, placing him at the lower end among prominent candidates. The filings also indicate that in many cases, spouses of candidates hold a larger share of movable assets, adding another layer to the financial disclosures.

title: Mayweather vs Pacquiao rematch may break $600M Vegas record
content: The rematch between Floyd Mayweather Jr and Manny Pacquiao is already generating huge excitement ahead of its planned date on September 19 in Las Vegas. That original “Fight of the Century” still stands as one of the most profitable events in boxing history. Now, with both superstars stepping back into the ring, promoters are aiming to deliver an even grander spectacle.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 6: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 650 cr India gross milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its historic dominance at the box office, amassing a staggering Rs. 844.76 crore in worldwide gross collections. This global haul is fueled by a robust Rs. 619.76 crore from the domestic Indian market and a powerful Rs. 225.00 crore from overseas territories. Currently, the high-octane sequel has already secured a domestic net collection of Rs. 519.12 crore, firmly establishing it as one of the fastest Indian films to reach these elite milestones.

title: 392 drones and 34 missiles: Russian strikes on Ukraine disrupt key European power route
content: Russia unleashed a significant overnight assault, deploying hundreds of drones and missiles across Ukraine, resulting in at least five fatalities and widespread damage. Critical energy infrastructure was hit, impacting power links to Europe. This escalation follows Ukrainian warnings of impending large-scale attacks, with both nations reporting intensified cross-border strikes recently.

title: Gold price today: Yellow metal falls for 5th straight session; check latest rates
content: Gold prices saw a fifth consecutive day of decline on Tuesday, despite rising retail rates in major Indian cities.  Futures contracts on MCX and international markets fell due to geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Investors are now keenly awaiting key US economic data for insights into the Federal Reserve's interest rate decisions.

title: ‘Aishwarya not in Sarkar 4’: Ram Gopal Varma confirms exit of Aishwarya Rai
content: Ram Gopal Varma has confirmed Aishwarya Rai Bachchan will not feature in 'Sarkar 4', promising a more expansive narrative and a bigger world for the upcoming installment. Filming is set to commence next month. The franchise, a cult favorite despite mixed reviews for sequels, continues its legacy with Amitabh Bachchan in the lead.

title: A road trip like no other: CERN transports antimatter by truck for the first time – here's why
content: CERN scientists successfully transported antiprotons by truck for the first time, suspending them in a vacuum within a specially designed magnetic trap. This four-hour test journey, including a half-hour drive, aimed to assess the safe movement of these fragile particles. The experiment is a crucial step towards enabling antiproton research at other institutions.

title: Madras high court to hear PIL to stall screening of 'Dhurandhar 2' until Tamil Nadu polls
content: A Public Interest Litigation has been filed in the Madras High Court seeking to halt the screening of the film 'Dhurandhar 2' in Tamil Nadu. The petitioner argues that the movie's political content violates the ongoing Model Code of Conduct. The court, acknowledging the film's release, advised the petitioner to file a formal writ petition for consideration.

title: Centre calls for all-party meeting amid escalating West Asia tensions
content: Amid escalating West Asia tensions and reports of an LPG crisis, the government convened an all-party meeting. Opposition leaders voiced concerns over the handling of the conflict and its impact on India's energy security. Prime Minister Modi is set to address Parliament on the economic and security implications, while defence officials reviewed preparedness

title: 'MS Dhoni should retire, he cannot be the Impact Player': Ex-India cricketer
content: Speculation surrounds MS Dhoni's role and future with Chennai Super Kings for IPL 2026. With fitness concerns and a younger squad, former cricketer Aakash Chopra suggests it might be time for the veteran to retire, paving the way for Ruturaj Gaikwad to lead. Dhoni's impact as a player versus a mentor is debated.

title: Pakistan, China, Sri Lanka see fuel prices rise as Hormuz choke fuels oil crisis
content: India is increasing coal burn to meet peak summer demand, while South Korea has relaxed limits on coal-based power. ​​Indonesia is prioritising domestic coal use over exports, tightening regional availability. Thailand, the Philippines and Vietnam are also leaning more on coal-fired generation to manage shortages.The shift is a short-term fix, but it risks worsening air pollution and delaying clean energy transitions.

title: No SC status on conversion to religions other than Hinduism, Sikhism or Buddhism: Top court
content: The Supreme Court ruled that individuals converting from Hinduism, Sikhism, or Buddhism to other religions lose their Scheduled Caste status. The top court upheld an Andhra Pradesh High Court order, stating that professing a different faith, like Christianity, disqualifies one from SC benefits and protections under the SC/ST Act. This bar is absolute, regardless of birth or caste certificates.

title: Watch: Missiles light up Tel Aviv skies as Israel’s multi-layered shield takes on Iranian strikes
content: Videos show Israeli air defense systems intercepting projectiles over central Israel amid Iran's latest ballistic missile launches. The IRGC announced "Operation True Promise 4," claiming strikes on "highly sensitive" Israeli and US-linked sites as part of its retaliatory campaign. Israel's multi-layered defense network, including Arrow, David's Sling, and Iron Dome, is actively countering these threats.

title: Air Canada collision: Flight attendant's miraculous escape after being ejected 100m from the plane
content: A miraculous survival unfolded at LaGuardia Airport when a flight attendant was ejected over 100 metres during an Air Canada Jazz plane's collision with a fire truck. While the crash tragically claimed two pilots and injured several others, the flight attendant, found strapped to her seat, is recovering from multiple fractures

title: DC playing XI for IPL 2026: Duckett vs Nissanka, who opens with KL Rahul?
content: Delhi Capitals have heavily revamped their squad for IPL 2026, spending nearly their entire purse to acquire new talent. With a blend of retained experienced players and new signings like Pathum Nissanka and David Miller, DC aims to overcome past underachievements and challenge for their maiden title.

title: Who is David Payne? English pacer signed by SRH as Jack Edwards replacement
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad has signed England pacer David Payne as an injury replacement for Jack Edwards for Rs 1.5 crore. Payne, a left-arm fast-medium bowler with extensive T20 experience and 304 wickets, joins SRH ahead of their IPL 2026 opener. He previously played one ODI for England and excelled in various T20 leagues.

title: Rajasthan Board website crashes after class 10th results declared: Check scores on TOI portal
content: The RBSE Class 10 Result 2026 was announced on March 24, but the official websites crashed due to heavy traffic from over 6 lakh students. While the overall pass percentage rose to 94.23%, many faced access issues. Students can check their scores through alternative platforms like the TOI results portal, DigiLocker, and UMANG without delays.

title: 'PSL a cruel mockery of our suffering': TTP's chilling warning to foreign players
content: Rebel groups have issued a stark warning to international cricketers, urging them to pull out of the upcoming Pakistan Super League (PSL). Citing the volatile security situation in regions like Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Balochistan, the TTP faction claims player safety cannot be guaranteed. This threat casts a shadow over the tournament, which the PCB insists will proceed as planned.

title: PM’s prepared text ‘full of self-praise’, says Congress on his RS statement about West Asia war
content: Like after his statement in the Lok Sabha yesterday, the Opposition was not allowed to seek any clarifications after Mr. Modi read out his statement in the Rajya Sabha, says Congress leader Jairam Ramesh on X

title: Government trying to procure gas, crude oil from all possible sources: PM Modi

title: West Asia crisis: Rahul slams Modi for Covid reference, says PM has forgotten tragedies of that time
content: The Prime Minister had said the difficult global conditions caused by the West Asia conflict are likely to persist for a long time and called upon the nation to remain prepared and united, just as it had stood together during the Covid pandemic

title: Affidavit on AAIB inquiry into AI 171 crash to detail stages of probe, 'where it stands today': Government tells SC, seeks two more days

title: Supreme Court concludes only Hindus, Sikhs, Buddhists can claim Scheduled Caste status
content: The Supreme Court found that conversion to any religion not specified in Clause 3 of the 1950 order by a Scheduled Caste member would lead to the loss of the reserved category status

title: ‘Drishyam 3’ postponed: Mohanlal-Jeethu Joseph film gets new release date
content: Mohanlal reprises his role as Georgekutty for what is announced to be the final film from the crime thriller franchise

title: Presumption that women officers had no long career in Armed Forces led to unequal playing field for them: Supreme Court
content: The Bench headed by CJI Surya Kant upheld permanent commission and consequent pensionary benefits for batches of women officers in the Army, the Air Force and the Navy

title: Kerala BJP chief Rajeev Chandrasekhar challenges Congress to prove ‘undisclosed assets’ allegations in court
content: Rajeev Chandrasekhar says Congress is raising such allegations “because they have nothing meaningful to say” about the development agenda BJP has set forth in this elections

title: ₹146.89 crore utilised for running seven Tier-II airports in Karnataka under UDAN scheme
content: To improve the viability of district airports, Karnataka has recently proposed to the Union Civil Aviation Minister that the UDAN scheme be extended from three years to five years

title: Delhi HC protects actor Sonakshi Sinha's personality rights
content: No third party has the right to use these attributes without Sonakshi Sinha’s consent or authorisation, the court noted

title: Delhi High Court dismisses Lalu Yadav's plea to quash CBI FIR in land-for-jobs case
content: Justice Ravinder Dudeja dismissed the petition by Mr. Yadav, a former Railway Minister and ex-Chief Minister of Bihar, that also sought quashing of the three chargesheets filed in 2022, 2023 and 2024 and the subsequent orders of cognisance in the matter.

title: CSIR-SERC begins monitoring health of Chennai Metro Rail’s composite girder span in corridor 4
content: The structural health monitoring system continuously tracks structural responses during train operations, with automated trigger mechanisms capturing critical data during train passage

title: Puducherry election: DMK releases candidate list for 13 seats, earmarks one seat for VCK
content: As part of the seat-sharing arrangement, the DMK has set aside Ozhukarai for its ally, the VCK. However, VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan had said that the party would contest the elections alone and field candidates in three seats

title: VCK adopts resolution seeking two-digit Assembly seats and one Rajya Sabha seat
content: The resolution came on Monday (March 23, 2026) after the  DMK sought to restrict the number of seats for its allies to accommodate new entrants, including the DMDK and the  Makkal Needhi Maiam

title: Watch: SC/ST status reserved for Hindus, Buddhists and Sikhs only; no benefits after conversion
content: The Supreme Court of India has upheld a ruling that individuals who convert to Christianity and continue to practice the religion cannot be considered members of the Scheduled Caste community.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) accepts five-seat offer, signs pact with DMK
content: The CPI (M), which was allotted six seats in the last Assembly elections in the same alliance, sought double-digit seats from the DMK but was denied due to the entry of more parties in the alliance

title: T.N. CM Stalin questions PM Modi on Centre’s preparedness for West Asia crisis
content: “Preparedness cannot be outsourced to the people. Prepared for what — leadership, or its absence? Who is expected to be prepared — the Union government or the people of the country?,” Mr. Stalin wrote in a post on X.

title: Radikaa Sarathkumar pulls off ₹75-crore ‘Thaai Kizhavi’ power move
content: As her Tamil blockbuster Thaai Kizhavi releases on OTT this week, Radikaa Sarathkumar rewrites rules of profit-sharing and ageing heroines in Tamil industry

title: Implementation of revised pay scales to Telangana government employees likely to take some more time
content: Tenure of the Pay Revision Commission extended till this month end, says Deputy Chief Minister; the government is likely to take a decision on the implementation of its recommendations after receiving the report

title: The cat is out of bag: Mamata over BJP rubber stamp on ECI letter row
content: Alleging that the development put a serious question mark on the poll panel’s impartiality in conducting the elections, Mamata Banerjee urged all parties to unite and fight the “EC-backed attempt to impose one-party rule in India”.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: BJP seal on Election Commission of India letter sparks row in State
content: CPI(M) asks whether seals are being casually swapped and all pretences are being dropped. Office of CEO, Kerala, says the 2019 letter, on which the BJP had affixed a seal when its functionaries approached the CEO’s office for clarification, was distributed recently by oversight

title: 'Asim Munir spoke to Trump': Is Pakistan emerging as backchannel in Iran war?
content: Pakistan is positioning itself as a key mediator in the US-Israel-Iran conflict, with its army chief and prime minister engaging in separate calls with US and Iranian leaders. Islamabad has offered its capital as a venue for potential discussions, aiming to facilitate peace amid ongoing regional tensions and stalled diplomatic channels.

title: RBSE class 5th, 8th result 2026 declared: Check scores here
content: The Rajasthan Board has declared the Class 5 and Class 8 results 2026 today, March 24, for over 26 lakh students. Results are available online on multiple official websites, where students can access provisional scorecards using their login credentials. The marksheet includes subject-wise scores, total marks and pass status. Students must secure at least 33 per cent to qualify, while supplementary exams will be conducted for those who do not meet the criteria.

title: Supreme Court slams bias in evaluating women officers for Permanent Commission
content: A bench of Chief Justice of India Surya Kant and Justices Ujjal Bhuyan and N Kotiswar Singh, while delivering its verdict, observed that the Annual Confidential Reports (ACRs) of women officers were often assessed casually, undermining their chances of securing PC. "ACRs of appellants were written with presumption that they will not undergo career progression. Adversely affected overall merit," the bench noted as per Live Law.

title: Did someone know? $580 million oil bet hit seconds before Trump’s Iran update
content: The timing of these trades mirrors earlier instances in recent months where large and highly profitable bets were placed on prediction platform Polymarket ahead of US military actions involving Iran and Venezuela.

title: US-Iran war hits India’s private sector; manufacturing slumps to over 4.5-year low
content: ​The manufacturing sector was hit the hardest, with its PMI dropping to a four-and-a-half-year low of 53.8 from 56.9. Heightened uncertainty and volatility linked to the Middle East conflict weighed on sentiment.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: VCK to contest eight seats in DMK-led alliance
content: As per the arrangement between the two parties, the VCK will contest six reserved Assembly segments and two general constituencies.

title: Sattankulam father-son custodial deaths case: All nine accused policemen convicted
content: The First Additional District and Sessions Court in Madurai found the policemen guilty of murder and various other offences. The court will pronounce the quantum of sentence on March 30

title: Sattankulam Jayaraj-Benicks custodial death case: Family wants severe punishment for convicted policemen
content: The sentence to be awarded to the nine convicted policemen should serve as a deterrent to those in power so that they do not misuse the power, the family members said.

title: T.N. election 2026: Tambaram constituency residents feel rapid growth continues to be marred by basic infrastructure issues
content: The Tambaram constituency lacks the civic amenities to tackle rapid urbanisation as arterial roads often face traffic congestion; untreated sewage is being discharged into lakes, and the interior roads remain in poor shape; MLA says drainage system has been implemented in the core areas

title: Supreme Court rejects petition for specific enumeration for Denotified Tribes in 2027 Census
content: “When we are striving for a casteless society, do you want to create more classes?” Chief Justice of India Surya Kant remarked while hearing the matter

title: ‘Cheer responsibly, celebrate responsibly’: Bengaluru Police make elaborate security arrangements for upcoming RCB matches at Chinnaswamy stadium
content: To ease traffic congestion and promote public transport, authorities have introduced a QR code-based e-ticketing system, which includes a metro pass, allowing spectators to commute conveniently across the city

title: Bengaluru’s Bannerghatta Biological Park to soon get 25-meter-high public observation tower
content: RNPF has committed a grant of ₹5 crore and the proposed tower will offer panoramic views of the forested valley of Bannerghatta National Park and the Bengaluru skyline enabling safe and regulated wildlife observation

title: Actor Sudeep’s Max distributor appeals against leave granted to ‘Kalaippuli’ Thanu to file suit in Madras High Court
content: The dispute relates to payments to be made to Mr. Thanu of V Creations with respect to Karnataka distribution rights given to KRG Studios LLP

title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026: UDF candidates full list
content: United Democratic Front (UDF) is led by Indian National Congress (INC) and includes Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), Kerala Congress (Joseph), Kerala Congress (Jacob) and Revolutionary Socialist Party (RSP)

title: What is the Sattankulam father-son custodial torture death case all about? | Explained
content: The horrific crime took place in June 2020 in Sattankulam, Thoothukudi district, Tamil Nadu, during the countrywide COVID-19 pandemic lockdown. It shocked civil society and sparked widespread protests

title: Supreme Court restores FIR and allows probe against IAS officer Manjunath in 2022 bribery case
content: The Supreme Court has restored a First Information Report registered against IAS officer J. Manjunath in an alleged bribery case, when he was serving as Deputy Commissioner of Bengaluru Urban in 2022

title: Two RSS workers arrested for hurling bomb at policeman’s house in Kerala’s Kannur
content: The attack targeted the residence of a Special Branch officer of Kannavam police station. However, the bomb failed to explode

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ and the perils of ‘nationalist’ violence
content: Such films are enabling the construction of a new kind of Indian citizen, in which a narrowly defined nationalism is the only virtue and is also indissolubly associated with violence

title: Telangana DCA cautions against unsupervised semaglutide use amid rising drug demand for weight loss
content: The DCA warned against procuring the drug through unregulated online platforms or unauthorised sellers, noting that such products could be spurious, substandard or unsafe

title: Kerala CM defends remarks on G. Sudhakaran, calls him ‘class traitor’ amid election row
content: Pinarayi Vijayan says he was only criticising ‘political betrayal’ and questions backlash over his choice of words

title: Kurinjipadi voters want non-polluting, agro-based industrial boost
content: Minister MRK Panneerselvam is in the fray aiming for a hat-trick in Kurinjipadi. The DMK-led Democratic Progressive Alliance needs to be aware that the Tamizhaga Vazhvurimai Katchi headed by T. Velmurugan and now delinked from the DMK-led alliance, is capable of eating into the votes of the DMK in areas like Kurinjipadi and Kullanchavadi where it has significant presence

title: Punjab official’s death: Autopsy to be conducted in Amritsar
content: The autopsy will be conducted at the post-mortem house of the government medical college in Amritsar, a police official told reporters

title: PM Modi did not say anything new, discussion on West Asia should happen in Parliament: Priyanka Gandhi
content: “The notice we have given for discussion should happen so that we can also reply and all sides can put forward their views. It would be good that a discussion happens in Parliament,” Ms. Gandhi said

title: West Bengal Assembly elections 2026: Trinamool Congress candidates list
content: Addressing a press conference in Kolkata, Mamata Banerjee said the remaining three seats in the Darjeeling hills will be contested by Anit Thapa-led Bharatiya Gorkha Prajatantrik Morcha (BGPM).

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?
content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: Ready for Opening Day? Here's your guide to the offseason chaos that rocked MLB
content: the new york Mets signed the offseason's no. 1 free agent to a record deal . the two-time reigning champion los Angeles Dodgers sent shock waves through the sport . if you know every signing and trade and still aren't quite sure what to make of the chaos, we've got you covered .

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: Ranking the best possible Stanley Cup playoff first-round matchups
content: if things stay the way they are right now, we will have a ton of turnover from last season . the Buffalo Sabres, Pittsburgh Penguins, Columbus Blue Jackets, Boston Bruins, Detroit Red Wings, Anaheim Ducks , Utah Mammoth and Nashville Predators are all ready for the postseason .

title: Welcome to WNBA chaos: Breaking down a chock-full offseason
content: the WNBA and women's national basketball players association agree to a new collective bargaining agreement . the agreement gives way to what both sides have described as a "transformational" deal . despite months of negotiations to reach this point, the previous CBA expired in October .

title: Women's March Madness Day 4 takeaways: How every team reached the Sweet 16
content: the final day of the second round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament is underway . we're tracking every game as the regional semifinals take shape . the three no. 1 seeds moved on easily, but there was plenty of intrigue elsewhere .

title: Men's Sweet 16 preview: Keys to every team advancing in the NCAA tournament
content: college basketball reporters break down what could decide each game in the next round of the 2026 men's NCAA tournament . the hottest team in the field, winning three games in five days to go from the first four to the Sweet 16 .

title: Wemby states MVP case: Want to leave no debate
content: San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama wants to win the NBA's most Valuable Player Award . he is averaging 24.3 points, 11.2 rebounds, 3.0 assists and 3.0 blocked shots . only six players have finished a season with such numbers: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, Hakeem Olajuwon and Patrick Ewing .
